search.query: | metadata type=hosts index=main | dedup host | table host
index=main sourcetype=jmx $host$ | dedup jvmDescription | table jvmDescription

index=main sourcetype=jmx $host$ $jvmDescription$ mbean_domain="java.lang" mbean_property_type="Runtime" |eval startedAt_secs=floor(startedAt/1000) | eval formattedJVMStartTime=strftime(startedAt_secs,"%H:%M:%S %d %B %Y") | stats first(jvmName) as jvmName first(jvmVersion) as jvmVersion first(jvmVendor) as jvmVendor first(jvmProcessName) as jvmProcessName first(formattedJVMStartTime) as formattedJVMStartTime max(eval(jvmUptime/1000/60)) as jvmUptimeMinutes by host jvmDescription
table host jvmDescription jvmName as "JVM Name" jvmVersion as "JVM Version" jvmVendor as "JVM Vendor" jvmProcessName as "JVM Process" formattedJVMStartTime as "JVM Start Time" | sort jvmDescription
chart max(jvmUptimeMinutes) as "Uptime in Minutes" by host jvmDescription
